_comment: Marketing decision-makers in B2B SaaS, France, 50-1,000 employees. Boolean title normalization captures CMO + 'Chief Marketing Officer' + 'VP Marketing' + 'Head of Marketing' + 'Director of Marketing'. Excludes fractional, freelance, consultants, and entry-level noise.

values.text: (CMO OR "Chief Marketing Officer" OR "VP Marketing" OR "Head of Marketing" OR "Director of Marketing") NOT (Fractional OR Freelance OR Consultant OR Intern OR Assistant)
